questions.cue_card: Describe a person who has strong opinions
prompts: Who this person is
How you knew him/her
What kinds of strong opinions this person has
And explain why you think he/she is a person who has strong opinions

questions.cue_card: Describe an old friend you had lost touch with and got in contact with again
prompts: Who he/she is
How you knew each other
Why you lost contact
How you got in contact again
And explain how you felt after getting in contact again

questions.cue_card: Describe an old person you know who has had an interesting life
prompts: Who this person is
Where he/she lives
What he/she has done in his/her life
And explain how you feel about him/her

questions.cue_card: Describe a time when you answered a phone call from someone you didn't know in a public place
prompts: When and where it happened
Who called you
What he/she said
How you responded
And explain how you felt about the experience

questions.cue_card: Describe something you did in your study/work that has made you feel confident
prompts: When and where it happened
What you did
Why it made you feel confident
And explain how you felt about it

questions.cue_card: Describe a challenge you faced that you thought was rather difficult
prompts: What it was
When and where you faced it
Why you thought it was a difficult challenge
And explain how you felt at the time
Is that a big city or a small place?
What's your hometown famous for?
Please describe your hometown a little.
Do you like your hometown? / What do you like (most) about your hometown?
Is there anything you dislike about it?
How long have you been living there?
Do you think you will continue living there for a long time?
